merchant_editorial: Varnish’s interior pays its respect to the nouveau dive bars of the States, but throws a sly nod to Perth’s own history with sepia-toned images of the neighbourhood’s yesteryear lining the walls. Bottle upon bottle of Kentucky bourbons and American whiskeys line the shelves behind the bar, rivalling what anyone else in Perth has done previously. Varnish on King doesn’t play by the rules, offering a number of innovative perks for their customers, such as the ‘Bacon & Whiskey flight’ where four different style of Whiskey are paired up to four different style of bacon... yep - it’s a thing! The venue also boasts a charming wine list, a list that is largely instinctive and changes frequently on a whim. Varnish on King also offers innovative food, with a fusion of American classics with an Australian twist. Open Monday - Friday, 4pm ‘til late, Saturday, 12pm 'til late.

merchant_editorial:
Nestled among the sand dunes of North Fremantle’s Leighton Beach, Bib & Tucker offers patrons a relaxed environment and a simple promise – a modern Australian menu with no compromise on quality or presentation.

Owners Eamon Sullivan, Steve Hooker, Jamie Dwyer and Scott Bridger have crafted the Bib & Tucker ethos from the legend of two bushrangers, Bib and Tucker, an ethos that is synonymous with fine food, fine company and good times. The restaurant offers a dining experience with a taste for quality and a beachside view that is second to none.

Located above the iconic Fremantle Surf Life Saving Club, the restaurant is always buzzing with friendly activity and conversation. Whether you’ve just walked in from the surf for a coffee or have scrubbed up for dinner, there is a place for everyone at the tables of Bib & Tucker.

Executive chef and co-owner Scott Bridger has created a seasonal menu imbued with flavoursome character.

My food philosophy is to keep it simple, with no compromise on quality or presentation. That said, I like to make food fun and exciting. At Bib & Tucker we use the freshest of ingredients, modern techniques plus styles and flavours from around the world to present a menu that caters to everyone that walks through our door.

Serving quality bar food from 11am until late every day. Level One Restaurant - Join us up here for more relaxed, family friendly dining and drinking. Enjoy a meal on one of the heritage verandas, reserve a spot for a function, dine in the restaurant or treat yourself to a high tea. Rooftop Garden - View Fremantle from above with 360-degree views to Rottnest and over the port. Available for partial hire for groups of all sizes. We stock a large range of premium international and local beers and wines and a great selection of spirits and gins.

merchant_editorial:
Experience sublime wine, gin, food & spectacular views at Wise Wine, Eagle Bay

The Margaret River Region is known for its stunning beaches and exquisite wines. Encompassed by the pristine Meelup Regional Park and sublime coastlines of Geographe Bay, Wise Vineyard is famous as the only Margaret River winery in the region with ocean views… where the vines meet the sea.

Wise winery was established in 1992, when Biochemist Dr Ron Wise and his wife Sandra bought the then Geographe Bay Estate (founded in 1983) and combined it with their nearby Eagle Bay Estate property.

Shortly after purchasing the property, Ron and Sandra engaged the services of two very close friends, Warren Randall (aka 'The King of Australian wine') and Dorham Mann.  Warren Randall issued advise on viticulture for the property, where he described the “Mazzas” block of Shiraz as the Club Med for grapes.  On that advice the remaining vines were pulled out and Wise Wine began sourcing grapes from premium growers around the state. Dorham Mann (who had previously studied together with Ron), then began the task of making wines in the style of his father, WA wine industry pioneer Jack Mann – essentially lightly wooded with ripe flavours.

From the year 2000 onwards winemakers Bruce Dukes and Amanda Kramer put the winery on the map with high quality Chardonnay and numerous international awards.

Now under the skilful direction of Larry Cherubino, Wise Wine produces superb wines of quality and consistency.  Specialising in distinctive wines including a wide range of alternative varietals, often small batch available from the tasting room.

The Wise property is home to one of Margaret River’s most renowned restaurants, the only one to overlook both the vines and the ocean.  In a truly iconic setting, surrounded by vineyard and the pristine natural bushland of Meelup Regional Park looking out to the sublime blue waters of Geographe Bay, we invite you to share our tranquil surrounds.
